content.en:
The True Yang Holy Ancestor gave Ye Tian a token, and once Ye Tian stepped into the Eight Extremes Realm, he could immediately join the Eight Extremes Building.

After all, the organization of the Eight Extremes Tower is much stronger than the Tower of Doom, and once he becomes a half-step Eternal Realm powerhouse in the Eight Extremes Realm, the Tower of Doom will not be of much help to him.

In fact, even if the True Yang Saint Ancestor didn't say it, he would have to find a more powerful force in the future.

Ye Tian stayed in the True Yang Palace for a few days, exchanging views with the True Yang Holy Ancestor before leaving the True Yang Palace.

After returning to the Maple Leaf Territory, Ye Tian's copy body condensed the clone, which annihilated itself, and then let the clone condense the copy body, so that Xiu Wei could keep up with the body.

In the years that followed, Ye Tian didn't cultivate much in the Will World, but instead used all his strength to compress the half-step eternal power in his body.

Ye Tian now has only one goal, that is, to compress the half-step eternal power to a tenfold level as soon as possible, so as to increase his strength to the point where he can truly touch the first boundary barrier, so as to impact the first boundary barrier and step into the eight-step Extreme Realm half-step Eternal Realm.

In order to be able to break through faster, Ye Tian even purchased an Eternal Compression Secret Technique from the True Yang Saint Ancestor that could compress 50 times the half-step Eternal Power.

For other extreme realms, it is very rare to be able to compress the Eternal Compression Secret Technique fifty times, but the True Yang Holy Ancestor is a half-step Eternal Realm of the Eight Extremes Realm, and its combat power is ~ a relatively weak Eternal Realm.

Therefore, the True Yang Saint Ancestor naturally had a top-notch, Eternal Compression Secret Technique.

Of course, the True Yang Saint Ancestor also felt that Ye Tian would definitely be able to break through and become a half-step Eternal Realm in the Eight Extremes Realm, so he would trade it to him.

If the other Seven Extremes Realm were to purchase such an Eternal Compression Secret Technique from the True Yang Holy Ancestor, it would be almost impossible.

This Eternal Compression Secret Technique is a stacked secret technique, which is many times more cumbersome than the Roulette Secret Technique.

Although Ye Tian still wanted to perfect the stacking secret technique, he was not in a hurry at the moment, he could completely cultivate the stacking secret technique now, and then compress it ten times first.

And so.

Ye Tian began to cultivate the stacking secret technique, compressing the half-step eternal power in his body.

One calamity after another years passed, and hundreds of thousands of tribulations passed, and Ye Tian succeeded in compressing the half-step eternal power in his body to ten times.

At this time, he felt that it was difficult for his strength to improve in the slightest, and he clearly sensed the first boundary barrier.

It seemed to tell Ye Tian that he had reached the extreme of cultivation and could not continue to improve his strength.

This is the first boundary barrier!

Ye Tian naturally would not be misled by the cognition transmitted by the First Boundary Barrier, he mobilized the will power of more than six thousand will worlds, mobilized the power of the whole body, and attacked the First Boundary Barrier.

Thundered!!!!

The First Boundary Barrier in the Darkness was crumbling under Ye Tian's second-order Eternal Will Power, and in the end, after countless impacts, the First Boundary Barrier collapsed violently.

Suddenly, that misconception vanished.

Spallation!

The whole body is transforming!

Endless origin energy poured into his body from the outside world, helping Ye Tian complete his transformation. At the same time, Ye Tian's half-step eternal power was also skyrocketing, and his will power was also rapidly increasing. Ding can say that Ye Tian's strength is improving almost all the time.

After a long time, Ye Tiancai completed a breakthrough. Bear.

At this time, his strength far surpassed the strength of the Seven-Extremes Realm half-step Eternal Realm, and he officially stepped into the eight-pole realm half-step Eternal Realm level.

After the breakthrough, Ye Tian immediately let the copy body open up the world of will.

Fail!

Succeed!

After the failure of the copy body again and again, Ye Tian continued to grope and successfully opened up many will worlds, and the number of will worlds increased.

Unconsciously, Ye Tian's will world reached more than eight thousand, which was also the benefit of his will improvement after breaking through to the half-step eternal realm of the Eight Extremes Realm.

"If the Eternal Will wants to reach the third order, I'm afraid it will have to impact to the Nine Extremes Realm and the half-step Eternal Realm level!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

The World of Will has improved so much all of a sudden, and his strength has increased a little, but he is still at the bottom of the half-step Eternal Realm in the Eight Extremes Realm.

this day.

Ye Tian came to the space-time territory where the headquarters of the Baji Building was located, the Evergreen Territory.

The Evergreen Territory is rich in resources, and the cultivation environment is much better than that of the Maple Leaf Territory, and it is almost controlled by the Eight Pole Building, and any member of the Eight Pole Floor can establish a base mansion here, etc.

After Ye Tian came to the Evergreen Territory, he entered the Eight Poles Building with the token given to him by the True Yang Holy Ancestor and applied to join the Eight Poles Building.

This token is a certificate to join the Eight Poles Building, if you don't have this certificate, the Eight-Pole Realm half-step Eternal Realm has to go through a series of assessments if you want to join the Eight Poles Building.

Soon, Bajilou agreed to the application and went through the formalities for Ye Tian.

At this point, Ye Tian became a member of the Baji Building.

......

"There are so many Eight Extremes Realm in the Eight Poles Building!"

Ye Tian held an information ball, which recorded a lot of information about the Eight Poles Building, including the number of the Eight Extremes Realm.

In other space-time territories, it is often only in multiple space-time territories that a half-step Eternal Realm powerhouse of the Eight Extremes Realm will be born, so the powerhouses of the Eight-Extremes Realm and the half-step Eternal Realm are extremely rare, and it is almost difficult for ordinary half-step Eternal Realms to see the side of the Eight-Extremes Realm and the half-step Eternal Realm.

コ Flowers,

But in the Eight Poles Building, there are many half-step Eternal Realm powerhouses in the Eight Extremes Realm, and now there are more than 3,000 Eight Extremes Realm in the Eight Extremes Building.

What surprised Ye Tian even more was that in this era, there was still a statue of the Nine Extremes Realm and a half-step Eternal Realm in the Eight Poles Tower.

Of course, the information given to him by the Eight Extremes Building only showed that there was a Nine-Pole Realm half-step Eternal Realm, but it didn't mention anything, not even a name.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian sent a message to the True Yang Holy Ancestor, informing him that he had joined the Eight Poles Tower.

Soon, the True Yang Holy Ancestor came to the Eight Poles Tower.

"Endless Ancestor, I didn't expect you to break through so quickly!" said the True Yang Saint Ancestor with a smile.

Ye Tian hurriedly said: "It's still thanks to the True Yang Holy Ancestor's stacking secret technique, otherwise, it will take some more years for me to break through." "

......... ，...... 0

"How about it, the strength of the Baji Building is okay, right?"

True Yang Saint Ancestor said.

Ye Tian nodded: "The strength of the Eight Extremes Building is indeed very strong, and there are actually more than three thousand Eight Extremes Realm. What surprised me even more was that there was actually a half-step Eternal Realm in our Eight Extremes Building. True Yang Holy Ancestor, who is this Nine Extremes Realm Half-Step Eternal Realm?"

The True Yang Saint Ancestor introduced: "This Nine Extremes Realm Half-Step Eternal Realm is the Stargazing Sword Ancestor, who broke through to the Nine-Extremes Realm Half-Step Eternal Realm six thousand years ago, and has not yet impacted the Eternal Realm. In fact, if the Nine Extremes Realm half-step Eternal Realm wanted to impact the Eternal Realm, it would be very easy. And once he breaks through, he can be regarded as a real powerhouse in the eternal realm. "

"Then why hasn't the Stargazing Sword Ancestor broken through?" Ye Tian said curiously.

"It is said that the Stargazing Sword Ancestor wants to cultivate to the extreme of the Nine Extremes Realm and the half-step Eternal Realm, and then break through to the Eternal Realm, he wants to directly break through to the Immortal Realm of the Eternal Realm and become the lord of the Immortal Realm, so he can't help but break through. "True Yang Saint Ancestor Dao.

Immortal Realm!

This is the third realm of eternity.

After coming to the space-time territory, he also knew the division of the eternal realm.

The Eternal Realm is divided into the Eternal Realm, the Immortal Realm, the Immortal Realm and other realms, after all, for the half-step Eternal Realm of many space-time territories, if you do not enter the Eternal Realm, there is a lifespan limit after all, so the first realm of the Eternal Realm is called the Eternal Realm.

Basically, most of the realms are eternal.

Just like those lords who went to the Source Sea in the first place, they were all Eternal Realm Lords.

Just as Ye Tian was thinking, the True Yang Saint Ancestor said, "Let's go, I'll take you to a place!"

Ye Tian followed the True Yang Holy Ancestor to a place in the Eight Poles Building. _

Fei Lu reminds you: three things to read - ∪ collection, recommendation, and sharing??
